prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约1497名，2024年升至约1330名（近年最佳），2025年回落至约1485名。近三年位次在1330-1497区间波动，2025年基准位次约1485名，整体呈高 位震荡格局；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2023-2025年均为8人，2026年大幅扩招至20人，增幅达150%。扩招将显著降低录取门槛，位次数字预计明 显增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；哈尔滨工业大学（本部）2026年软科主榜第12名，属全国顶尖工科院校；深圳校区共享本部学科评估与声誉资源，地域优势突 出；2026年高考周期内哈工大声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第10（高热），短视频曝光量高，反映考生关注度持续升温；2024年曾 出现投档线波动信号，但已消化；力学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程为A+；计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、软件工程、土木工程等为A；信息与通信工程、光学工程等为A-。共17个A-及以上学科，工科实力顶尖。2026年招生专业（工科试验班）覆盖计算机、通信、人工智能、自动化等优势方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校位于广东深圳，属一线城 市，对山东考生有较强地域吸引力；计算机类、电子信息/通信、人工智能等专业社会热度持续高热，2024年电子信息/通信评为高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化评为高热推荐；山东2026年考生总数约72万， 较2025年增加约5.7%，全省竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1485名、2026年大幅扩招150%（计划从8人增至20人）这一核心 利好、山东考生总数增加约5.7%带来的竞争加剧、以及计算机/人工智能等热门专业的高报考热度，预计2026年录取位次较2025年明显后移（位次数字增大），但考生规模增长和 热门专业效应会部分抵消扩招带来的降幅。预测最低位次约2622名，区间2323-2921名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（未来信息）（计算机科学与技术、通信工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（自主智能）（人工智能、机器人工程、自动化）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年该校在山东大幅扩招至20人，预测位次区间2323-2921名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（≤2323名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（ 计算机/通信方向）；位次接近区间上限（约2900名）可考虑二档专业保底。两专业均为热门工科试验班大类，入校后可在类内任选专业，报考性价比高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 1497, rising to about 1330 in 2024 (best in recent years), and falling back to around 1485 in 2025. Over the past three years, rankings fluctuated within the range of 1330-1497, with a baseline ranking of about 1485 in 2025, showing a high-level volatile pattern. The comprehensive enrollment plan in Shandong Province was 8 students from 2023 to 2025, but in 2026 it will significantly expand to 20 students, an increase of 150%. This expansion will notably lower the admission threshold, and the ranking number is expected to increase significantly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; Harbin Institute of Technology (main campus) ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, belonging to the top engineering universities nationwide. The Shenzhen campus shares the discipline evaluation and reputation resources of the main campus, with prominent geographical advantages. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, HIT's reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 10th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting sustained attention from candidates. In 2024, there were signals of admission line fluctuations, but they have been absorbed. Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Environmental Science and Engineering are A+; Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Software Engineering, and Civil Engineering are A; Information and Communication Engineering, Optical Engineering, etc., are A-. There are 17 A- and above disciplines, with top engineering strength. The 2026 enrollment majors (Engineering Experimental Class) cover advantageous directions such as computer science, communication, artificial intelligence, and automation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Shenzhen, Guangdong, a first-tier city, which has strong regional appeal to Shandong candidates. Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and artificial intelligence continue to be highly popular in society. In 2024, electronic information/communication was rated as a high-heat recommendation, and electrical engineering and automation was also rated as a high-heat recommendation. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Shandong is about 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% compared to 2025, intensifying competition across the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 1485 in 2025, the significant enrollment expansion of 150% in 2026 (plan from 8 to 20 students) as a core positive factor, the intensified competition due to a 5.7% increase in the total number of Shandong candidates, and the high application enthusiasm for popular majors like computer science and artificial intelligence, it is expected that the admission ranking in 2026 will significantly shift backward (ranking number increases). However, the growth in candidate numbers and the effect of popular majors will partially offset the decline caused by the expansion. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2622, with a range of 2323-2921.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (Computer Science and Technology, Communication Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence) (Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering, Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the university will significantly expand enrollment in Shandong to 20 students, with a predicted ranking range of 2323-2921. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors with Tier 1 as a reach; those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (≤2323) can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (computer/communication directions); those with rankings near the upper limit (around 2900) can consider Tier 2 majors as a safety option. Both majors are popular Engineering Experimental Class categories, allowing students to choose any major within the class after enrollment, offering high cost-effectiveness for application.
